title: DR.VIVA Smart Watches for Men, Fitness Tracker with Heart Rate Monitor, 1.3" Full Touch Screen Sleep Monitor 18 Sport Modes 7-Day Battery Life 5ATM Waterproof Watches for iPhone/Android Phones
features: 【Heart Rate Monitor & Sleep Monitor】Built-in PPG heart rate sensor coupled with HR algorithm, the smart watch can accurately monitor your heart rate during wearing. Automatic sleep tracking can monitor your sleep status (deep sleep, shallow sleep, awakening) and provide a comprehensive sleep quality analysis. All health tracking metrics can help you get a better understanding of your health and make reasonable adjustments to your lifestyle.

【Accurate Fitness Tracker & 18 Sport Modes】The activity tracker accurately record all-day activities like steps, distance, calories burned, miles walked, active minutes. The fitness tracker supports 18 sports modes: running, walking, climbing, cycling, basketball, football, tennis, aerobics, yoga, rope jumping, sit-ups, swimming, etc. Can give you more detailed insights into your whole day's activities and improve your athletic performance. Stay motivated all day!

【Long Battery Life & 5ATM Waterproof】The fitness tracker for men is equipped with a 170mAh Li-Polymer battery, only takes 2 hours to get fully charged by a magnetic charging cable to support 7 days of normal use. The fitness watch is 5ATM waterproof, you can wear it when washing hands, in the rain, or swimming in the shallow water, which allows you to swim in the pool with it without worries. (Note: Do Not support hot water shower, diving, surfing, saunas, spring, etc).

【1.3" Full Touch Screen & Custom Watch Face】Our smart watch with 1.3 inch IPS LCD color touch screen display, brings a resolution of 240x240. You can also customize the watch face in the "Zeroner" App to show your personality. DIY for your preferences and mood.

【Smart Notifications & More Practical Tools】The smartwatch is wide compatibility with iOS & Android. You can receive incoming calls or read SMS and SNS notifications on your smartwatch. (It CAN'T answer/reply to messages, calls, or text back.) (Including SMS, Facebook, Whatsapp, Twitter, Instagram, etc.). You will never miss important news. The smartwatches also feature remote control of music and camera, sedentary reminder, alarm clock, stopwatch, timer, a compass to meet your daily needs.

reviews.title: Keep track
reviews.text: This fitness tracker is simple to setup and in no time it'll be keeping track of your health so you have a monitor of what you do every day. It's simple to track and manage your sleep patterns or steps you take in a day. Very simple to use mobile app. The watch lasts a long time before dieing at least 2 days

reviews.title: Super impressed with this watch. Truly remarkable
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:ae47b9651b52b2c1b0485219f33680bf]] Wow. I am not impressed by much, but this watch is truly impressive for this price point.

Build: Very good build quality. The waterproof case feels solid, with responsive buttons and full color high res screen. Bracelet is soft rubber and is very comfortable. It's a very large band, so large or small wrists will fit in here.

Features: Though not perfect, the features on this watch are impressive. Measures steps, activities, heart rate, laps, sleep quality. Very very nice featuers. Plus it's waterproof!!!

Cons: Some of the interfaces are a bit clunky, and the app could use work, but it's fairly intuitive, and easy to use. I connected to my Galaxy S7 with no problems.

I recommend this watch!

reviews.title: My favorite budget smart watch
reviews.text:
I've tried a variety of budget smart watches, and this one by Dr.Viva has become my favorite. It's very comfortable, great flexible band, no issues with feeling like it's pressing into my wrist bones. The screen display is a good size without being too large, perfect for smaller wrists.

The Zeroner app has been fantastic, no problems. It accurately tracks my steps, sleep & oxygen. I like how it has a variety of exercises for me to document. The battery life is a big winner. I recharge the smart watch once a week, compared to twice a week with the other watches I've tried before. I was disappointed that I don't have the option to have my own picture as the screen display, but the app still has plenty of screens to choose from.

If you're like me and don't want to spend an exorbitant price on a smart watch, but would still like to enjoy the features of a smart watch this one would be a great option.

reviews.title: Inaccurate
reviews.text: This is a cute watch. Set up was simple. I liked the pink band and it was comfortable. The multi-lingual instructions are useless. Even worse it is inaccurate. I was at my desk and took it off. When I came back it said I logged 1800 steps.  It was sitting in the same place on the desk. Not. Back to my fit bit.

reviews.title: Very Durable and Love the Face
reviews.text:
The watch and band are more durable than I expected at this price point. The watch is very easy to install and should not take more than 5 minutes. For some reason I really like the aesthetics on the face of the watch.

I have another watch that is comparable and this watch costs 25% less. This is definitely good value. A watch like this is a game changer for people monitoring heart issues. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: I was worried that this cable damaged my watch.
reviews.text: I bought this item as extra charging cables for my Vivomove Style, which has physical watch hands in addition to the electronic display. Every time I use this charger instead of the OEM charger, the time shown by the physical hands is hours off and I have to realign.  It also seems to become much less sensitive to touch until I plug it back into the OEM charger to reset it.  The Vivomove Style will keep the time on the physical hands 2 weeks after the battery dies (and I've never seen it not keep accurate time), so it wasn't a dead battery issue.  I was hoping to have more than one cable to charge my watch but based on the issues I'm having,  I'm going back to the OEM cable.

reviews.title: This is just a 22mm silicone watch strap, ignore the smartwatch stuff if you're using a real watch.
reviews.text:
Recently Amazon had a sale on a watch I like, a Seiko Solar 42mm faced 22mm lug analog watch. A real watch, that tells time, day, date and that's all, what we in the watch enthusiast world like to call a "tool watch". Because it's a tool for telling time. Period. I"m a semi-retired IT engineer and have more than enough screens in my life, I don't need nor want one in place of a real watch too. This watch runs for 10 months on a full charge from a light source and never needs a battery replacement, eat your heart out 3 day smartwatches.

I decided being as the watch is black with a sort of stencil font on the face indices that I'd take a chance on this band and accessorize it with a military-looking Army Green silicone band -- Because I do not wear permeable (leather, nylon, canvas, cloth, etc.) watch straps I decided an Army Green silicone band was the way to go with the new watch and put the canvas band that came on it in a drawer. I don't wear NATO straps either, first because they're permeable nylon (permeable is a no-no for me) and secondly because to me they look like someone tried to tie their watch on their wrist with a chunk of old seat belt.

This band fits on a 22mm lug's spring-bar perfectly. It's very easy and fast to remove or replace too. I've tried to get it to let go of the spring-bar "by accident" and it's on there very solidly, at least as solid as any other system. I have a rather large 8" wrist and there's room to spare on the band. It's also very quick and easy to remove or replace, I wish more bands would use this kind of system. I wish more bands came in this length too, it's hard fro me to find one that fits without strangling my hand.

The "keepers", the little loops that hold the tongue of the strap in place where it emerges from the buckle, have lugs on them that fit in the sizing slots on the band. That's a GREAT extra feature because those keepers tend to wander up and down the watchband without those lugs to hold them in place. This can cause either the tongue of the band or the keeper to snag on something which can break the band or the keeper loop. No problem with this band, the lugs on the keepers stabilize them exactly where you put them. This is something that is not shown nor addressed in the product description and very much should be. It's a deciding factor for me and I might have returned the watchstrap if it didn't have those lugs on the keepers.

The band is about the thickness you'd expect and has no discernible taper from lug to buckle. Being silicone it weighs very little and does not appreciably add to the weight of the watch and strap combo. It's just a good, plain, non-reactive, non-absorbent, military looking watchstrap. That will fit on any watch, smart or otherwise, with a 22mm lug. I don't know if I'd use this strap on an Omega or a Rolex, mostly because those are much heavier watches than the one I use the strap on. It's a little plain for a multi-thousand dollar plus watch too, I think there are better choices. But for a watch I got at less than half price and intend to wear every day to save my nicer watches the wear, tear and scratches that come with that kind of use ... This band works perfectly.

The only complaint I have with it is that I could do without the little "smart watch" triangles, of which there are three. One on the buckle and one near each lug attachment. But that's a very, very minor issue and not worth taking a star off my review over. I knew they were there when I ordered it and this is a style thing not a failure in design and materials thing. This particular watch that I'm using this band on has a very similar little triangle on the bezel above the 12 o'clock indices so it looks like the strap was made for the watch ... sort of. Actually now that I look at it some more, it looks quite natural.

We'll see how long it lasts, I just got it. If it has an unreasonably short service life I'll come back here and add an edit to this review. If you don't see that addition, what I say here stands current.

That product is inspected and tested to work and look like new by Amazon-qualified suppliers. Then, the product is sold as an Amazon Renewed product on Amazon. reviews.title: It could have been so much better.
reviews.text: I have so many feelings about this watch. First off, set up was a breeze. You just open your app store and get the Google app directed. Pairing and synching up your info is very easy. The watch is very beautiful! I was scared the crystals would rub right off like glitter, but I have not had any issues so far. Now for all the bad stuff.. first and foremost the battery life is terrible. I would give it 9-10 hours max. I'm not much of an app person either, so if you are then that means your battery life will be even lower. It has its own charger, so that means you'll have to carry it around with you, especially big your planning to go out after work or school which is very inconvenient. I with it was a standard C USB charger so I can just use my phone charger, but sadly that's not the case. I did an experiment to see how long the battery would last. I charged it to 100%, and left it in my desk right before bed. In the morning at 8 am, I am at 15%. Whoa. Yeah, the battery is just really really terrible. So I thought I'd just change the battery settings..well there is only one other option and that is to go into battery saving mode where all it will display is the time. That in my opinion defeats the purpose of a smart watch. Other than that, I love how I can customize watch faces by using my social media, or pick from a pre made list by Michael Kors. You can also get email notifications, download apps like Google keep to take notes by speaking into your watch, as well as use Google pay, activity tracker, weather, and pause and play music without taking out your phone. So yeah, if your okay with a short battery life, then everything else about this watch is awesome. Just giving you the real tea. Hope you found this review helpful.

reviews.title: Great feminine watch for dress up or down
reviews.text: This watch works with android and iPhone which makes this a winner in my book. It does pretty much everything my iwatch series 4 does and it looks beautiful on my wrist. Charger is magnetic and easy to use.

reviews.title: Easy set up - does what a smartphone can do
reviews.text:
My wife really likes this watch. This is the one with the glittery watchband... It comes with a magnetic charger that just attaches to the back - no fidgeting. And I was surprised at how quickly it charged.

The screen colors are great! Vibrant colors and clear graphics. The touchscreen itself can lag just a little, but overall responds very well. Neither one of us have ever had a smartwatch before and I was a little apprehensive about setting it up, but I downloaded the wear OS app to her phone and from there, it just walked us through the process. It paired on the first try and seems to be working just as it should.

She's now got it set up to check emails and can generally do anything on the internet that she would do with her phone. Then theres the added advantage of the fitness stuff... heart rate monitor, etc.

All in all, she loves it!

reviews.title: Still Searching
reviews.text:
The MKGO has the best battery life of any WearOS watches I've tried. On a fairly busy day with the app running in the background on my iPhone the whole time, I was able to wear the watch from 6 a.m. until I went to bed around 10. The other three android watches I've tried didn't make it to dinner.

But this doesn't have a speaker.

Why doesn't this have a speaker?

One of the indispensable features of my Apple watch is being able to answer a call quickly when I have stepped out of the room my phone is in. I have lupus. I can't run. People somehow seem to know to call about something important when I've gone to the bathroom or stepped out to the mailbox. I'm close enough to be connected to my phone, but not close enough to answer it.

This never happens with spam calls. Just the ones from the people I won't be able to get back to through their nightmare phone menus.

The lack of this feature makes the watch unsuitable for me, and that makes me sad, because the iPhone is a begware spamming disappointment machine these days, and I really want to move to android.

reviews.title: Nice watch
reviews.text: Shipping was very slow but the watch is nice.  Took minutes to install.  easier than my apple watch.  does everything i need that my series 4 does but is discrete and fashionable.  Love the pink color..... my favorite.  Touchscreen works fine and easy to navigate.  A great buy for those who dont necessarily want an apple watch.  I am able to sync my contacts and apps to the watch.  Tracks my heart-rate on command.  I love this watch.

title: Garmin Forerunner 245, GPS Running Smartwatch with Advanced Dynamics, Berry
description: You do the running. Forerunner 245 does the thinking. This GPS smartwatch doesn’t just tell you where you ran. It tracks your stats, crunches the numbers and gets to know all about your performance, your running form, your training history and even your goals. All you need to focus on is putting one foot in front of the other.Bezel Material: fiber-reinforced polymer.
features: GPS running smartwatch with advanced training features
Battery life: up to 7 days in smartwatch mode and up to 24 hours in GPS mode
Get free adaptive training plans from Garmin Coach, or create your own custom workouts on our Garmin Connect online fitness community

Provides advanced running dynamics, including ground contact time balance, stride length, vertical ratio and more (When used with Running Dynamics Pod or HRM-Run or HRM-Tri monitors (sold separately))
Safety and tracking features include incident detection (during select activities) which sends your real-time location to emergency contacts through your paired compatible smartphone
Customize with free watch faces, apps and more from our Connect IQ store
Evaluates your current training status to indicate if you’re undertraining or overdoing it; offers additional performance monitoring features

reviews.title: great looking watch and great for running and biking
reviews.text:
I really like this watch. I replaced and old forerunner. (many generation old) It feels great and looks good since you can download and tailor the watch faces. I have downloaded music to it using MediaMonkey and it worked fine. So far, synching with earbuds Jaybird Tarah Pro and Vistas, has been good. The availability of watch faces and activity widgets is nice.
But
Be warned, it takes a little bit to set it up and understand how to understand how to download and update activity widgets. Updating of watch faces isn't too bad. Be patient and read the user guide, there is a lot of functionality you should be aware of whether you use them or not.

reviews.title: Great purchase
reviews.text:
Great, does all of the stuff running nerds love. Spotify is a hassle to sync when i want to adjust my playlists. This is especially annoying for podcast listeners such as myself. For this reason, I could have gone without the music upgrade and just used my phone but I still use the music feature a good amount for my shorter speed runs where I need the running jams!

But obviously I didn’t take a star because Garmin is the GOAT

reviews.title: Great watch
reviews.text: I bought this for my husband, an avid runner, for our anniversary. He is super into tracking, numbers, stats, etc. And he loves this watch! He previously had the Forerunner 235 Garmin but it was probably close to five years old. He had done alot of research on this one verses the newer models and this one still came out ahead and did not disappoint!

reviews.title: great fitness watch!
reviews.text: if you are looking for a smart watch, then this is not for you. however, if you want a fitness watch, then get this one! the gps tracking is great and accurate! it takes a little bit to get used to the buttons and where all the settings are, but i love that i can customize it to do just what i want in terms of display, audio outputs, etc. the band is comfortable and the watch face is a good size to see my stats while working out without being overly cumbersome (i'm a small 5'0" female). i love that it can play my spotify playlists! the only thing of note is that it will not be able to get any data such as weather, sms notifications, calendar updates, emails, phone calls, or send emergency assistance notices unless you have your phone with you and connected via bluetooth. the point of this watch for me was to keep my phone at home so those features don't work during my run, but it does do the fitness tracking and play previously setup spotify playlists, so it's exactly what i want and need. i don't use it for sleep tracking since i only wear it during workouts. love the heart rate monitoring too!

reviews.title: Sleep Tracking and Incoming Call Notification (on android) are EPIC failures
reviews.text:
Overwhelming 5 start reviews really make me skeptical that the reviews themselves are genuine....
Overall the watch is not bad but really needs functional work. The Android Dev/QA team should have some re-training/structuring after releasing this to the general public...
Sleep tracking shows me as sleeping if I am in bed relaxed watching tv during sleep hours, making it useless. I only receive an incoming call notification on the watch if my phone screen is unlocked...
missed calls come in every time..

no problems with GPS, Battery Life, Music , Bluetooth, feeds to 3rd party athletic tracking apps. all those work fine.

Not sure I would buy this again.

title: Vowor 4G Smartwatch for Kids with Sim Card, Waterproof Phone Watch with WiFi LBS GPS Tracker Video Chat SOS Camera Alarm Clock Anti Lost Watches Children Boys Girls Birthday Gift Age 3-15 (Black)
description:
Vowor Smart watches 4G for Kids
Kids smartwatch supports 4G/3G/2G Nano sim card with data and voice plans.
GSM Bands:
US: B2/B5
3G Bands (WCDMA):
US: B2/B5

US:B2/4/5/7/12/17
Note:
1. you need to have voice and data plan to make the kids phone watch works properly 2. The Vowor 4G kids phone watch is NOT compatible with Verizon or Sprint, we recommend T-Mobile, Speedtalk and AT&T. But it is ok if your own's phone (parent's) card is Verizon or Sprint. The Vowor kids smartwatch doesn't support other APP except Leefine.
Q&A:
1. Why the watch doesn’t have the network(The watch shows "Search ... " for a long time)
(1) The SIM card is not overdue. (2) Check the upper left corner of the watch interface for stable signal icons or up and down arrows. If no, please restart the watch. (3) There may be no set the correct APN.
2. Why the watch cannot recognize the SIM card
(1) Confirm that the SIM card is not overdue. (2) Confirm that the SIM card is installed in the right direction. (3) Power off before card insertion. (4) Change the region and try again.
3. Why can't I make a video call
(1) Confirm that the SIM card has data and the network signal is stable. (2) Check whether the APP side is disabled for video calls. (3) Other family members who want video calls need to have a Leefine account and bind the watch. (4) Whether all permissions of APP needed are granted. (5) The APP needs to be opened, run and work in the background. Only the video call is initiated on the watch end, the APP end can receive the push message. (6) The video call has just ended. It will take 5 minutes for the watch end to call again.
Package Included:
1 x Kids smartwatch 1 x USB cable 1x User manual 1x Watch screen protector 1x sim card
features: 【Vowor 4G Kids Smart watch】: the smartwatch kids 4G has all functions you need: Face-talk (video calling), wifi LBS GPS Tracker, geofencing, Pedometer, Voice chat, Texts, Anti-lost, Class Mode, HD Camera, Historical tracker, Safe zones, Remote monitoring, SOS, alarm clock, low battery notification etc. It is a great gift for your kid 3-15 years old.

【Two-way Calling】: the Vowor 4G kids phone watch supports video calling and voice calling, you can chat with your kids face to face, but also can make a voice call. Make sure your sim card have the plan with Voice & Data: voice plan is for calling, and data plan is for network.

【4G WIFI LBS GPS Tracker】: Double position technology based on AGPS, Location Base on Cell Tower Station means double safety for kids. GPS is suitable for outdoor(especially in open areas),with a little inaccurate; WIFI is suitable for indoor, the accuracy depends on the carrier's backend database; LBS depends on the density of the communication base station and where you are, the inaccurate is relatively large. The watch choose GPS first, then WIFI, and finally the LBS. At the same time, parent

【Safety Protection】: 4G smartwatch for Kids equipped with an LBS/GPS/WIFI system that accurate location, you can check the real-time location of your kids and history activity footprint. You can also set the child's range of activity, if the child leaves the set area, the geofencing feature will alerts you. Accurate activity tracker, built-in speed sensor.

【1-year Warranty】: The kids smartwatch is made of high quality material, anti-fall and durable. The band strap is made of soft Silicone, it is very comfortable to wear it and it does not scratch the hand. We will provide 1-year warranty, replacements such as band strap or data cords will be send out for free. If you have any problems about our smart watches, Please feel free to contact us first. We will reply you within 24 hours.

reviews.title: Good watch. Has sensory issues
reviews.text: Husband loves his Christmas gift. Only complaint we have is he has flick his wrist multiple times very hard to get it to light up. He plans to see if there’s  anything he can on his end to not have to that. It’s a great watch for the price.

reviews.title: Great watch
reviews.text: This watch did everything I needed it to do.  It keeps very accurate time and has many excellent features.  The ones I was most interested in were the sleep tracker, heart and blood pressure monitor and step counter as these  are medically necessary.  The accuracy was top of the line.  My only issue is this watch caused the area on my skin that contacted the watch to get a bad rash.  While the rash was essentially harmless, it is caused by a chemical reaction in my body.  Not the watches fault, and I've experienced this side effect with other watches in the past.  Now I use it only occasionally and for only a couple of days at a time to still track the previously mentioned condition.  It's a great watch that I would recommend.

reviews.title: Quality

reviews.title: The Perfect Watch

Self-Healing, flexible, tough, military-grade thermoplastic urethane, designed to absorb impact. The TechSkin is resistant against scratches, punctures, UV light and will not yellow
Easy, error-proof, and anti-bubble installation. Liquid solution allows adjustments during installation. Significantly reduces dust, oil and fingerprint smudges
Optically transparent, virtually invisible, and HD Clear screen protector with smooth glass-like surface and "True Touch" feel. A great alternative to a typical "static cling" PET screen protector
Lifetime Warranty from Manufacturer. Made in the USA. Includes original Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector compatible with the Sony Smartwatch

reviews.title: 5-star product!
reviews.text: You have to love it when a product, even something as simple as a thin piece of plastic, outperforms your expectations. Packaged extremely well with everything you'd possibly need, I had my watch cleaned, prepped and completed in minutes. I will use the Skinomi brand for my iPad, Kindle Fire and Samsung Galaxy S III as soon as their old (non-Skinomi) screen protectors need replacement.

reviews.title: Really impressed
reviews.text: Got this for my Sony LiveView and while I was shocked to see that the installation process was more than other screen protectors (ie cell phone screen protectors), installation was pretty simple. After it dries, you can't even tell a screen protector is on!

reviews.title: It's soft
reviews.text:
Like another reviewer had mentioned, they are soft. I used a rubber squeegee that I've used on countless other screen savers, and it actually damaged the skin. It has permanent "bubbles" (more like dents) in it that will not go away. Other than that, the fit is perfect. And the skin comes very nicely packaged with everything you could ever need, including a bottle of soapy water for the application.

The attention to detail by Skinomi is second to none. The company gets five stars, but I've got to deduct one for the soft material. Skinomi did include a squeegee, but it's too big for use with this skin. Had I cut it down to size and used it, I may not have "dents" now.

reviews.title: Good idea
reviews.text: This is a good idea to protect the screen. If you where to scratch it you could just replace the screen saver.

reviews.title: Most comfortable Fitbit band I've found( and I've tried many)
reviews.text: As other reviews say, this band is very comfortable. I  hate the feeling of dampness from plastic bands. This one is flexible and breathable. I have a small wrist and Velcro let's me adjust easily. I wish I could get other colors, as I do not like black or white colors, but for around the house or yard work this band is fine.

reviews.title: Very lightweight

Pros: lightweight, easy to adjust, does not stick to grocery carts like the magnetic ones.
Con: if it gets into anything messy, as in the kitchen, it needs to be cleaned right away. It doesn’t just wipe off; it needs to be washed.

reviews.title: Perfect

reviews.title: Good Replacement Band For Fitbit Sense
reviews.text:
The AK Silicone Band attached securely to my Fitbit Sense without any problems.
It fits my wrist perfectly and is very comfortable to wear. I've had it on for approximately a month with no issues. It's not as easy to put on my wrist as the original Fitbit band, but that is a minor issue.

reviews.title: Love it!

title: iTOUCH Explorer 3 Smartwatch (with Heart Rate Tracking, Step Counter, Notifications)
features: HEALTH AND FITNESS TRACKER: The iTouch Explorer 3 smartwatch has a built-in pedometer and a heart rate monitor that automatically tracks your steps, calories burned, cardiovascular activity and sleep. With up to 7 days of battery life!

BONUS FEATURES: Receive notifications for calls, texts, and social media. Daily weather and the 7-day forecast on your wrist. Turn your Explorer 3 into a shutter button with Camera Remote. Control your phone’s music without taking it out of your pocket with Music Remote. Set reminders to drink more water, wash hands, even get up and move around when you’ve been sitting too long. Open our mobile app to track female health, log meals, water intake, weight changes and caffeine consumption.

RUGGED DESIGN: The iTouch Explorer 3 is IP68-rated water resistant with a durable glass screen and a metal bezel to protect your device through general wear and tear. Battery working time: about 7-10 days; Standby time: 30 days.

SPORT MODES: Add another dimension to your fitness with Sports Mode. Choose from a variety of options. Activate to track steps, distance, and calories. Workouts automatically sync with the mobile app so you can look back at your entire history.

FITNESS GOALS: Stay motivated by setting goals in the iTouch Wearables app for steps, calories burned, sleep, water intake, weight and more. Check the app to see all your completed goals. LARGE WATCHFACE LIBRARY: Choose from built-in watch faces, create your own or access the LARGE watch face library in our mobile app! MOBILE PHONE COMPATIBILITY: Connect your Explorer 3 to any Android or iPhone using the iTouch Wearables app*. (*requires iOS 13 or higher and Android 9 or higher)

reviews.title: The itouch EXPLORER 3 SMART WATCH is great for monitoring your health
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:1dfba93f62e565c5c393181e1d06cded]] What I liked about the ITOUCH EXPLORER 3 SMART WATCH is the very accurate way it keeps track of your health it’s designed with your health in mind it’s easy to use and very easy to setup and stylish and sturdy comfortable wrist band and the battery life is fantastic easy to read dial and it’s a good value for your money it makes a great gift
